description: Fix 3 review issues: setSA implicit event reference, remove unused premium_data.json, add minimum premium validation
steps: Step 1: Fix setSA function to accept btn parameter instead of using implicit event.target
Step 2: Update all onclick handlers for setSA to pass 'this' as second argument
Step 3: Remove premium_data.json from the repository using git rm
Step 4: Add minimum annual premium validation (Rp 4,000,000) with warning note below results
acceptance_criteria: setSA function does not reference implicit event global
All setSA onclick handlers pass the button element as second argument
premium_data.json is removed from the repository
Calculator shows warning when annual premium < Rp 4,000,000
verification: Run: python3 -c "content=open('/projects/sandbox/Project-pap/index.html').read(); assert 'event.target' not in content; print('No implicit event reference')"
Run: python3 -c "import os; assert not os.path.exists('/projects/sandbox/Project-pap/premium_data.json'); print('premium_data.json removed')"
Run: python3 -c "content=open('/projects/sandbox/Project-pap/index.html').read(); assert '4000000' in content or '4.000.000' in content; print('Minimum premium check present')"
findings: All 3 review issues resolved. setSA now accepts a btn parameter and uses btn.classList.add('active') with a null guard. All 7 onclick handlers pass 'this'. premium_data.json removed via git rm. Minimum premium warning shows when annualPremium < 4000000 with yellow info box below the Detail Perhitungan section.
